description: Crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable! Height: 25cm Width: 38cm Depth: 12cm Made from leatherette with a faux snake skin design for style Has a main roomy zippered compartment with two inner zippered compartments Organiser sleeves to hold a mobile and essentials Two short handles for carrying ease and style Brand name embossed on the front Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
